description_long: This is a high-performance road bicycle with a lightweight, aerodynamic carbon fiber frame finished in a striking red color. The bike features deep-section aero wheels, drop handlebars with integrated brake and gear levers, and a slim racing saddle. The drivetrain is composed of a compact crankset and a rear derailleur, optimized for speed and efficiency. The front and rear wheels are equipped with disc brakes for superior stopping power. The frame geometry is aggressive, designed for speed and efficiency, with a slightly sloping top tube and internal cable routing for a clean look. There are no baskets or racks attached, emphasizing its focus on racing and performance.
description: A sleek, red aerodynamic road bicycle with deep-section wheels, drop handlebars, and a racing saddle, built for speed and performance.
description_view_0: Front view showing the narrow profile, drop handlebars, and slim front wheel.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the aerodynamic frame, deep-section wheels, and drivetrain components.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the thin rear wheel, racing saddle, and rear triangle of the frame.
description_view_3: Right side view showing the chain, crankset, and detailed frame geometry.
